description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments: windows (x86, x86_64, mingw), macos (x86_64, arm64), and linux (x86_64 and a matrix of aarch64, armv7, riscv64). For each job, check out the repository, set up luamake, and run various luamake commands for building and testing.
